## Equations
### EQC001 — Finite-range disordered Hamiltonian

*Fixes hopping orientation, onsite disorder, and boundary matrices.*

$$
H=\sum_{|i-j|\le M} t_{i,j}c_i^\dagger c_j
$$

status: `verified` · source: label: model

Numerical form:

```
LongRangeModel.hamiltonian(onsite, boundary, twist)
```

Code: `code/src/lyapunov_band.py::LongRangeModel.hamiltonian`


### EQC002 — M=2 one-site transfer matrix

*Propagates the same eigen-equation as the finite Hamiltonian by one site.*

$$
psi_{i+2}=-(t_1/t_2)psi_{i+1}+((E-w_i)/t_2)psi_i-(t_{-1}/t_2)psi_{i-1}-(t_{-2}/t_2)psi_{i-2}
$$

status: `verified` · derived from: `EQC001` · source: tex_contains: \tilde{T}_l(E)=

Numerical form:

```
site_transfer_matrices(energies, onsite, model)
```

Code: `code/src/lyapunov_band.py::site_transfer_matrices`


### EQC003 — Lyapunov spectrum and clean beta-root limit

*Defines the ordered state vector behind every Lyapunov prediction.*

$$
gamma_s=lim_{L to infinity} eig[(2L)^{-1} ln(T^dagger T)]_s; gamma_s=ln|beta_s| at W=0
$$

status: `verified` · derived from: `EQC002` · source: label: t_matrix; tex_contains: \ln|\beta_{s}(E)|\rightarrow \gamma_s(E)

Numerical form:

```
lyapunov_exponents(energies, onsite_sequence, model)
```

Code: `code/src/lyapunov_band.py::lyapunov_exponents`


### EQC004 — OBC non-Hermitian Thouless relation

*Predicts OBC potential and density from the M largest exponents.*

$$
phi_OBC=sum_{s=M+1}^{2M} gamma_s+E[ln|t_M|]; rho_OBC=(2pi)^{-1} nabla^2 phi_OBC
$$

status: `source_only` · derived from: `EQC003` · source: label: pot_obc; label: den_obc

Numerical form:

```
lyapunov_potentials(exponents, model).obc
```

Code: `code/src/lyapunov_band.py::lyapunov_potentials`


### EQC005 — PBC non-Hermitian Thouless relation

*Predicts PBC potential and density from the positive exponents.*

$$
phi_PBC=sum_{gamma_s>0} gamma_s+E[ln|t_M|]; rho_PBC=(2pi)^{-1} nabla^2 phi_PBC
$$

status: `source_only` · derived from: `EQC003` · source: label: pot_pbc; label: den_pbc

Numerical form:

```
lyapunov_potentials(exponents, model).pbc
```

Code: `code/src/lyapunov_band.py::lyapunov_potentials`


### EQC006 — Essential Lyapunov exponent and mobility edge

*Centralizes the ALM/skin/UCS transition rule and mobility-edge contour.*

$$
gamma_ess=argmin_{gamma in {gamma_M,gamma_{M+1}}}|gamma|; gamma_ess(E)=0
$$

status: `verified` · derived from: `EQC003` · source: label: ess; label: mobility

Numerical form:

```
essential_lyapunov(exponents) and classify_state(exponents)
```

Code: `code/src/lyapunov_band.py::essential_lyapunov`, `code/src/lyapunov_band.py::classify_state`


### EQC007 — Winding number from positive Lyapunov count

*Defines the integer topological criterion for skin versus ALM.*

$$
nu(E)=M-n_P(E)
$$

status: `verified` · derived from: `EQC003`, `EQC005` · source: label: winding; label: winding2

Numerical form:

```
winding_from_lyapunov(exponents, M=2)
```

Code: `code/src/lyapunov_band.py::winding_from_lyapunov`, `code/src/lyapunov_band.py::direct_twist_winding`


### EQC008 — Anderson-localized fraction

*Summarizes the transition as the fraction of OBC states with opposite-sign central exponents.*

$$
alpha=int rho_OBC(E) Theta[-gamma_M(E)gamma_{M+1}(E)] d^2E
$$

status: `verified` · derived from: `EQC004`, `EQC006` · source: label: ratio

Numerical form:

```
alm_fraction(eigenvalues, exponents)
```

Code: `code/src/lyapunov_band.py::alm_fraction`
